auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

Admin.welcome: Welcome back, here is the center status today.
Admin.manageStudentsDesc: Search, review, and manage learner account status in your tenant.
Admin.reportSnapshotDesc: Activity and assessment signals from the last week.
Admin.activityTrendDesc: Lesson opens and completions recorded per day.
Admin.activityDayTooltip: {sessions, plural, =0 {0 opens} one {# open} other {# opens}} · {completed, plural, =0 {0 completions} one {# completion} other {# completions}}
Admin.attemptsValue: {count, plural, =0 {0 attempts} one {# attempt} other {# attempts}}
Admin.overviewLoadError: Cannot load dashboard overview right now.
Admin.newStudents7dValue: {count, plural, =0 {No new students in 7 days} one {# new student in 7 days} other {# new students in 7 days}}
Admin.inactiveStudentsValue: {count, plural, =0 {No inactive students} one {# inactive student} other {# inactive students}}
Admin.activeEnrollmentsValue: {count, plural, =0 {No active enrollments} one {# active enrollment} other {# active enrollments}}
Admin.trackedSessionsValue: {count, plural, =0 {0 tracked sessions} one {# tracked session} other {# tracked sessions}}
Admin.noCoursesDesc: Get started by creating your first course for your center.
Admin.createNewCourseDesc: Start your journey of sharing knowledge.
Admin.courseNamePlaceholder: e.g., Next.js Programming from Basics to Advanced
Admin.aiSettingsDesc: Store prompt and review rules for future AI feedback.
Admin.aiPromptPlaceholder: Describe how AI should grade, guide, or roleplay this course.
Admin.startBuildingDesc: After creating, you'll be able to add lessons to the curriculum.
Admin.unitLessonCount: {count, plural, =0 {No lessons} one {# lesson} other {# lessons}}
Admin.noLessonsInUnit: No lessons in this unit yet.
Admin.confirmDeleteUnit: Delete this unit? Its lessons will stay in the course as ungrouped lessons.
Admin.enrollmentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No enrolled students} =1 {1 enrolled student} other {# enrolled students}}
Admin.learningProgressDesc: Enrollment-level completion and activity for this course.
Admin.noEnrollmentReport: No enrolled learners yet, so there is no progress report.
Admin.noStudentsDesc: Try another search or switch the status filter.
Admin.studentsFound: {count, plural, =0 {No students found} one {# student found} other {# students found}}
Admin.confirmDeleteLesson: Are you sure you want to delete this lesson?
Admin.cannotLoadCourses: Cannot load courses. Please try again later.
Admin.cannotCreateCourse: Cannot create course. Please check API connection.
Admin.confirmDeleteCourse: Are you sure you want to delete this course? This action cannot be undone.
Admin.lessonQuizSummary: {count, plural, =0 {No questions} one {# question} other {# questions}}
Admin.quizQuestionsDesc: Build the in-lesson check learners answer immediately.
Admin.practiceManagementDesc: Build the question bank and publish practice exercise sets by course or unit.
Admin.practiceLoadError: Cannot load practice authoring right now.
Admin.lessonAiPromptPlaceholder: Describe the roleplay or scenario for this lesson.
Admin.practiceSelectCourseFirst: Select a course before creating practice questions and exercise sets.
Admin.exerciseSetsDesc: Published sets that learners can submit for feedback.
Admin.noPracticeQuestions: No practice questions found for this scope.
Admin.noExerciseSets: No exercise sets found for this scope.

Admin.attemptCount: {count, plural, =0 {No attempts} one {# attempt} other {# attempts}}
Admin.questionPromptPlaceholder: Write the question learners will answer.
Admin.answerOptionsPlaceholder: One option per line. The first line is index 0.
Admin.selectedQuestionsValue: {count, plural, =0 {No selected questions} one {# selected question} other {# selected questions}}
Admin.practiceRequiredFields: Course, prompt, and correct answer are required.
Admin.practiceOptionsRequired: Multiple-choice questions need at least two options.
Admin.practiceCorrectAnswerIndexRequired: Correct answer must be a numeric option index.
Admin.practiceCorrectAnswerIndexRangeRequired: Correct answer index must match one of the options.
Admin.aiQuestionHint: AI questions use the reference answer now. Gateway scoring can replace the fallback later.
Admin.practiceSetRequiredFields: Course, title, and at least one question are required.
Admin.examManagementDesc: Create and publish exam templates with sections, questions, scoring, and attempt review.

Admin.examTemplatesDesc: Published or draft exams for the selected course and unit.
Admin.examQuestionsDesc: Add, duplicate, and reorder questions before creating the exam.
Admin.noExams: No exam templates found for this scope.

Admin.examRequiredFields: Course, exam title, section title, question, and correct answer are required.
Admin.examQuestionsRequired: Add at least one valid exam question.
Admin.examQuestionValidationError: Fix invalid questions before creating the exam.
Admin.examOptionsRequired: Multiple-choice exam questions need at least two options.
Admin.examCorrectAnswerIndexRequired: Correct answer must be a numeric option index.
Admin.examCorrectAnswerIndexRangeRequired: Correct answer index must match one of the options.
Admin.examNumericFieldsRequired: Duration, passing score, and points must be valid numbers.
